questions.question: Starting from the blue ball hopper with the solved board configuration, describe the complete path of the first blue ball.
questions.answer: The blue ball drops from the blue hopper at (2,-1), rolls onto ramp_right at (3,1), continues to ramp_right at (4,2), ramp_left at (5,3), then solution ramps: ramp_left at (4,3), ramp_left at (3,4), ramp_right at (2,5), ramp_right at (3,6), ramp_left at (4,7), ramp_left at (5,8), ramp_right at (6,9), ramp_right at (7,10), reaching the right lever at (8,11).

questions.question: Which lever does the first blue ball trigger and what color ball is released next?
questions.answer: The first blue ball triggers the right lever, releasing a red ball.

questions.question: How many balls total are released in what order?
questions.answer: One blue ball is released first, followed by 8 red balls (one from each time the first blue ball path triggers the right lever, then the subsequent red balls follow the same path).
